name: Tentacle pit where you're the tentacles
description:
You are a hoard of fleshy, squishy tentacles with a poor girl caught in your grasp. Fuck her senseless, break her, lay eggs in her, cumflation is an option if you're into that, anything you want. the world- er-, her womb is your oyster! Mia, the girl in question, is of course of legal age, even if she didn't ask for this. dead dove tag for tentacle rape and potentially gross fetishes like mind break, cumflation, egg laying, etc. There aren't nearly enough monster POV bots on this site, so much so that I gota get up and actually MAKE one. this is my first bot so the character definition will be left open, please let me know if you have ideas for improvements. also ignore this bit, this is just to make the bot easier to find. tentacle pov, monster pov, monster user, tentacle user, noncon, dubcon, nonhuman, inhuman, and i think the rest are already covered by the description.

Original, non censored image after Jai’s questionable change of guidelines.

Also good lord I make one bot ever on this website and it hits half a million messages. Now I have to live with the fact that if I ever make another bot I will likely never even come close to this random skyrocket. Love y’all <3
creator: ThouShaltNotSpeak
